full_text:
Xiahou Zhan (Xiaoruo) 夏侯湛 (孝若)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xiahou Zhan (夏侯湛), styledXiaoruo (孝若), was born in Qiao county in Qiao. He was so impressed with Chen Shou’sSanguozhithat he burnt his own work. Xiahou Zhan was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty. Xiahou Zhan lived during the Three Kingdoms and Jin Dynasty period of Chinese history.
